title: Tier 3 frozen manifest
description: Fail-closed manifest contract for tier3-decisions-v1. Payloads and credentials are not embedded; only provenance, checksums, policy, audits, and eligibility are recorded.

assemblyAccession.description: Assembly accession must include an explicit version.

uri.description: Immutable public source URI or absolute staged file URI; must not contain credentials or a signed query string.
